title: Connect Numbers Columns to Chart Benchmark Lines
excerpt:
I would love to be able to add a Numbers Column variable in a Chart’s Benchmark Lines so the benchmark line auto-updates when the number in the Number column changes. 
Use Case: There is a board that scopes hours per rol…

posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to be able to add a Numbers Column variable in a Chart’s Benchmark Lines so the benchmark line auto-updates when the number in the Number column changes.

Use Case: There is a board that scopes hours per role for each project. The chart reflects actual time spent on the project (actual hours are submitted in a time tracking board). Right now, the scoped hours benchmark line in the charts are updated manually, so the person has to complete duplicative work updating the board and then the chart.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great suggestion! Would love to see this change. Have you taken a look at the reporting apps to see if they can do this?
